framework.name: Authenticated Delegation Framework for AI Agents
framework.description: A proposed standard extending OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect to enable humans to securely delegate authority to AI agents with verifiable credentials, explicit permission scoping, and maintained accountability chains. Distinguishes authentication (identity confirmation), authorization (permitted actions), and auditability (verification of claims).
framework.raw_quote: We introduce a novel framework for authenticated, authorized, and auditable delegation of authority to AI agents, where human users can securely delegate and restrict the permissions and scope of agents while maintaining clear chains of accountability. This framework builds on existing identification and access management protocols, extending OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect with agent-specific credentials and metadata, maintaining compatibility with established authentication and web infrastructure.
